commands.review_summary:
The PR adds opt-in reset-family history lookup, a default-off embedded-agent carryover compaction-summary transform, and matching protocol, tool, config, docs, generated-client, and regression-test updates.

PR surface: Source +696, Tests +1298, Docs +7, Other +4. Total +2005 across 53 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. The embedded/Gateway mismatch is visible on the PR head: Gateway guards the final session-start filter with `!includeFamily`, while embedded mode still filters the flattened family result unconditionally.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the branch has a concrete embedded/Gateway parity defect plus stale exact-head proof and maintainer decisions around stack order and archived-context exposure.
